post_rendered:
Welcome to Mafia Game 175: Cat Mafia
Rules
  • Rules
    • 1.1: Read the rules. All of them. Read them multiple times if necessary.
    • 1.2: Do not post at night.
    • 1.3: You may PM me at any time and ask me anything, such as rule clarification.
    • 1.4: Do not quote or pretend to quote any PMs from me, including role PMs.
    • 1.5: Do not talk about this game outside of this topic to anyone other than the mods in charge, unless I specifically allow you to do so.
    • 1.6: You may not use any formatting that has an effect of concealing text. This includes size=1, hide="", color=#FFFFFF, and color=white, among others. This does not include adding extra spaces.
    • 1.7: Do not edit or delete posts you have already submitted; this includes editing right after you post (what goes in the thread stays in the thread). If you for any reason find the need to change your post, use EBWOP or EBWON as necessary.
    • 1.8: If you are dead, do not post anything else about the game anywhere. You may still spectate the game, but you may no longer post in this thread.
    • 1.19: Do not use the colors red (#FF0000), blue (#0000FF), green (#008000), or anything that appears similar, as these colors are used for modding purposes.
    • 1.10: Confirm by posting Confirm
  • Voting/Hanging
    • 2.1: Post votes in bold font in the format "Vote: <insert player here>". Since AoPS does not distinguish between usernames with different capitalizations, the capitalization of the player name does not matter. l and I are identical. For example, "Vote: fdas" and Vote: fDAs is an acceptable vote, while "Vote: fdas", "Vote fdas", “vote: fdas, Vote:fdas, Vote: fads, Vote: fdsa, and "Vote: fdas" are not.
    • 2.2: Votes may not be placed in hide tags.
    • 2.3: Improperly made votes will not be counted under any circumstances. It does not matter if it is the end of the game hammer and everyone revealed their roles. Hint: don’t reveal your roles and declare victory until I made the official end of the game post.
    • 2.4: You may vote for no hang to occur during a day. Vote this by including in your post "Vote: No Hang".
    • 2.5: You do not have to unvote before making a new vote, though it is appreciated if you do so. Unvote in the format "Unvote". An unvote will undo your previous vote, if any.
    • 2.6: Spell the username of the player you wish to vote for exactly. Do not use nicknames.
    • 2.7: If at any point in a day more than half of the votes are for a single player, that player will be hanged. It will then immediately be twilight.
    • 2.8: If at any point in a day at least half of the votes are for no hang, then there will be no hang. It will then be twilight.
    • 2.9: The moment the deadline passes, no more votes will be counted even if the mod has not made a post.
    • 2.10: During twilight, players may still post. However, no more votes and/or unvotes will be processed.
    • 2.11: Once I post a end-of-day scene, the person hanged (if any) is officially dead. Night then immediately begins. You may not post during night.

  • Activity
    • 3.1: Each day will be 336 hours (2 weeks). The moderator may extend the deadline for the end of the day at his/her discretion. Note that this will be unlikely.
    • 3.2: The deadlines will follow the official time
    • 3.3: The deadline will occur the very second 336 hours has occurred.
    • 3.4: If the deadline is met and no person is hanged, it will be considered no hang and will proceed to be twilight.
    • 3.5: The night deadline will be 72 hours after night begins.
    • 3.6: When the night deadline is met, if the moderator does not receive a night action from either a player or his/her partner(s) (if you have them), the player will lose the chance to perform an action during that night.
    • 3.7: Any night results will be sent after the night deadline
    • 3.8: Night will end at some time after the night deadline when the mod makes the post announcing the end of night.
    • 3.9: If a player does not post in a 48-hour period and he/she is not in V/LA, you will receive an in-game prod.
    • 3.10: If a player does not post in another 24-hour period after receiving an in-game prod and he/she is not in V/LA, he/she will receive a PM prod.
    • 3.11: If a player does not post in another 48-hour period after receiving a PM prod and he/she is not in V/LA, he/she will be replaced, unless you post before the moderator finds a replacement.
    • 3.12: If a player receives 5 PM Prods, he/she will be replaced
    • 3.13: If a player is going to be V/LA, he/she must post in bold in-thread or PM me. The moderator will not prod the player unless the V/LA is too long.

  • Etiquette
    • 4.1: Do not use inappropriate language.
    • 4.2: Do not make any personal attacks.
    • 4.3: Follow all of the rules.
    • 4.4: Be mature.
    • 4.5: For a minor rule infraction, newbies can receive up to two warnings, SE’s up to one, and IC’s none. If a player commits an infraction after he/she has run out of warnings, or commits a modkill level infraction, he/she will be modkilled. Please do not make me modkill you.

  • Moderators/Co-Moderators
    • 5.1: I (fdas) am the moderator of Mafia Game 175 and benjaminsz will be the co-mod.
    • 5.2: Red-colored text (#FF0000) is used for official votecounts and activity checks by the moderators. It is also used for mafia flavor-related posts.
    • 5.3: Blue-colored text (#0000FF) is used for the moderator and co-mod's posts other than votecounts and activity checks.
    • 5.4: Green-colored text (#00FF00) is used for town flavor-related posts.
    • 5.5: The not voting section is to be ignored if it contradicts any other part of the votecount
    • 5.6: If an error to the votecount is not pointed out within 5 days, the incorrect votecount will become official.
    • 5.7: The moderator may change the rules at any time.
    • 5.8: The moderator has the last say in interpreting the rules.

  • Read all of the rules

Setup
This game will use the Matrix6 setup. This is a semi-open setup.

In this setup, there are 9 players. Three of the roles will be generated randomly by picking a row or column from the matrix. Then one Mafia Goon and 5 Vanilla Townies are added to maintain a 2:7 mafia:town ratio. The six possible setups are:
1. 5 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town Jailkeeper, 1 1-Shot Bulletproof Townie, 1 Mafia Roleblocker, 1 Mafia Goon
2. 6 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town Cop, 2 Mafia Goons
3. 5 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town Doctor, 1 Town Tracker, 2 Mafia Goons
4. 6 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town Jailkeeper, 2 Mafia Goons
5. 5 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town Cop, 1 Town Doctor, 1 Mafia Goon, 1 Mafia Roleblocker
6. 5 Vanilla Townies, 1 1-Shot Bulletproof Townie, 1 Town Tracker, 2 Mafia Goons

Doctors cannot protect themselves two nights in a row.
Note that if applicable, a Mafia Roleblocker's action takes precedence over a Town Jailkeeper's action. The power of the 1-Shot Bulletproof Townie cannot be roleblocked.


Role PMs
Vanilla Townie Role PM wrote:
Welcome <player>!


You are a House Cat (Vanilla Townie).
You are small and relatively weak, and thus have no night actions, but your power comes in your meows and your vote.

You win when all threats to the town have been eliminated and there is at least one town player alive.

You can find the game thread here.
Cop Role PM wrote:
Welcome <player>!


You are a Jaguar (Cop).

As a very powerful and sneaky cat, you can safely follow other cats around for a night and learn their allegiances. Each night, you may PM me the name of one player to inspect. You will receive a result of innocent or guilty (town or mafia), or that you got no result (you were somehow blocked).

You win when all opposing factions are dead and there is at least one town member alive, or nothing can prevent that from happening..

You can find the game thread here.
Doctor Role PM wrote:
Welcome <player>!


You are a Leopard (Doctor).
As a small but still powerful and more agile cat, you are good at moving others out of harm’s way. Each night you may PM me the name of a player (excluding yourself) to protect. That night, one kill targeting that player will fail (unless you were somehow blocked).

You win when all opposing factions are dead and there is at least one town member alive, or nothing can prevent that from happening.

You can find the game thread here.
1 Shot BP PM wrote:
Welcome <player>!


You are a Fat Cat (1-Shot Bulletproof).

You are an exceptionally fat cat. Because of your large mass, you need to be attacked twice before you die.

You win when all opposing factions are dead and there is at least one town member alive, or nothing can prevent that from happening.

You can find the game thread here .
Jailkeeper Role PM wrote:
Welcome <player>!


You are a Human (Town Jailkeeper)

As a human, you have the ability to lock up a cat in a cage, for its own sake of course. Each night, you may PM me the name of one player to lock up. That player will be protected from one kill that night, and also unable to take any night actions.

You win when all opposing factions are dead and there is at least one town member alive, or nothing can prevent that from happening.

You can find the game thread here.
Tracker Role PM wrote:
Welcome <player>!


You are a Cheetah (Town Tracker)

As the fastest land animal, you find it easy to follow people. Each night, you may PM me the name of one player to track. You will receive the player(s) that the person targeted, if any, or that you got no result (you were somehow blocked).

You win when all opposing factions are dead and there is at least one town member alive, or nothing can prevent that from happening.

You can find the game thread here.
Mafia Goon Role PM wrote:
Welcome <player>! You are a Lion (Mafia Goon).
You are a powerful pack predator, with the goal of establishing dominance among the cats. Your mafia partner(s) are <partner(s)>. You may discuss in this <quicktopic>. You may also decide on who to kill, which one of you or the other goon(s) will perform.
You win when the mafia obtain the majority and nothing can prevent this from occurring.
You can find the game thread here.
Mafia Roleblocker Role PM wrote:
Welcome <player>! You are a Tiger (Mafia Roleblocker).
You are the self-styled apex predator, and are bent on proving it. Your mafia partner(s) are <partner(s)>. You may discuss in this <quicktopic>. You may also decide on who to kill, which one of you or the goon(s) will perform.
You may roleblock a player so that they cannot perform a night action that night. However, you may not kill and roleblock in the same night.
You win when the mafia obtain the majority and nothing can prevent this from occurring.
You can find the game thread here.


Alive(5)
summitwei
SFGiantsFan
avanders

kevinmathz


Dead (4)
lkarhat (House Cat)
NewOrleansSaints4DaWin (Jaguar)

Warnings

Do not post until this line is crossed out.

Day 1 begins. Current time: 17:00:00 EST 6 November 2018.

(Protip: I tend to like removing the inner quotes, instead of dropping the outermost ones. It's a lot nicer to read IMO and usually the innermost quotes are less pertinent to the conversation.)

I see what you're saying with Mafia giving thoughts to look towny, and I agree that to some extent it's good to be worried about overly active Mafia controlling the gamestate. However, town also has very good reason to be active - posting and seeing what others post is the only real way people find scum, so of course being active can only help towards solving the game. So almost always there are reasons for why scum would do something, but most of the time there are equally good reasons for town to do the exact same thing. Optimally, you can build a case that shows why one is more probable than the other.


Good start though, I do like how you're thinking about possible scum motivations behind actions.
